response.justification: Strong senior software developer with 15+ years of experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective founder), Linux/Unix background, and a track record across architecture-heavy projects. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate self-reports only basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German consulting context. Formal team leadership/management experience is also light relative to a Head of Development position.
strengths: Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architecture and long-term ownership
Broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, DLang, Python-adjacent, Linux) with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven public communication via talks, workshops, and courses — useful for mentoring and client advisory
concerns: German only at basic level, well below the required C1 proficiency
No explicit Head-of/Tech-Lead title or evidence of leading interdisciplinary teams of devs and consultants
UML, requirements management, and formal IT security/compliance experience are not demonstrated
